title: Megumin Totem of undying
description: Replaces the Totem of Undying with Megumin from KonoSuba
body:
This resource pack replaces the Totem of Undying with a custom pixel art of **Megumin** from the anime *KonoSuba: God's Blessing on This Wonderful World!*.

- Faithful to the Minecraft style
- No cheats or gameplay changes
- Designed for fans of anime and explosions!

This is a purely visual change and works on all vanilla servers.
